hero_title: POS Software in Bangladesh That Makes Shop Management Easier
hero_subtitle: Bill faster, track stock, record bKash/Nagad payments, and see profit clearly from one simple POS built for Bangladeshi shops.
hero_description: Whether you run a grocery, pharmacy, fashion shop, restaurant, or multi-branch store, AndgatePOS helps replace khata, Excel, and billing confusion with clean daily records.
features_heading: Everything Your Shop Needs, All in One Place
features_description: Sales, stock, accounting, reports — 15+ built-in modules so you never need another app.
feature_dashboard_desc: Real-time KPIs — today's revenue, top products, pending orders, and stock alerts at a glance.
feature_pos_desc: Sell in seconds — barcode & camera scanning, variant/serial selection, multiple payment methods, instant receipt.
feature_checkout_desc: Sell in seconds — barcode & camera scanning, variant/serial selection, multiple payment methods, instant receipt.
feature_purchase_desc: Full purchase lifecycle — create drafts, approve orders, receive goods, and track supplier payments & dues.
feature_inventory_desc: Real-time stock levels, manual adjustments with reasons, low-stock alerts, and idle product tracking.
feature_product_desc: Manage variants, serial/batch tracking, bulk Excel import, and print barcode or QR labels.
feature_order_desc: View all sales orders, process returns & refunds, print invoices, and track payment status.
feature_supplier_desc: Supplier profiles, outstanding dues tracking, payment terms, and supplier performance reports.
feature_customer_desc: Customer profiles, loyalty tiers (Normal / Silver / Gold / Platinum), purchase history, and credit balance.
feature_catbrand_desc: Organise your catalogue with category trees, brand profiles, and brand images — synced to your online store.
feature_expense_desc: Record daily business expenses by category (rent, utilities, salaries) with date and description.
feature_accounts_desc: Double-entry bookkeeping — manage ledger accounts and journal entries to keep finances audit-ready.
feature_reporting_desc: Sales, invoices, P&L, tax, stock valuation, low stock, supplier dues, customer analytics — all filterable.
feature_staff_desc: Add employees, assign roles (Cashier / Manager), and control who can access which modules.
feature_barcode_desc: Generate and batch-print barcode or QR code labels for any product directly from the dashboard.
feature_multistore_desc: Manage all your branches from one dashboard — switch stores, compare sales, and sync stock.
feature_notifications_desc: Real-time alerts for low stock, new orders, and system events. Send broadcast announcements to your team.
feature_returns_desc: Process order returns with customisable reasons, restock decisions, and a full refund history — no pen and paper.
feature_loyalty_desc: Reward regulars with Normal / Silver / Gold / Platinum tiers and automatic loyalty point tracking.
feature_offline_desc: Internet cut off? Keep selling. Orders queue locally and sync to the cloud the moment you reconnect.
feature_vat_desc: VAT-inclusive and exclusive pricing, automated tax calculation, and period-wise tax reports for compliance.
why_us_subtitle: Not just another POS — built specifically for how Bangladeshi businesses actually run.
why_us_1_desc: Sell, collect payment, and print receipts even when your internet goes out. Orders sync automatically the moment you reconnect.
why_us_2_desc: bKash, Nagad, Rocket & Upay built in. Taka currency, Bengali interface, VAT-compliant reports — no plugins needed.
why_us_3_desc: Every plan includes a free Hawkeri online store. Add a product once — it's live at your counter and on your website instantly.
why_us_4_desc: Sales, purchase, stock valuation, expense, P&L, VAT, low-stock alerts, reorder suggestions — every number you need.
why_us_5_desc: Own more than one shop? Manage all branches from one dashboard — compare sales, transfer stock, and run unified reports.
bd_payments_heading: All Bangladesh Payment Methods, Built In
bd_payments_subtitle: No extra integration. Accept cash, bKash, Nagad, Rocket, Upay, card, and bank transfer — right from the counter.
reports_heading: 20+ Reports — Every Number You'll Ever Need
reports_subtitle: Filter by store, date range, or category. Export to PDF or Excel in one click.

aff_faq_a1: Direct payment to bKash / Nagad. Withdraw when your monthly balance reaches ৳500+.
aff_faq_q2: For how long do I earn commission?
aff_faq_a2: Sales commission on the first payment, then up to 12 months of customer retention bonus when eligible active subscriptions renew.
aff_faq_q3: How do I demo the product?
aff_faq_a3: After registration you'll get a full demo account with real data. You can show it from your phone at any shop.
aff_faq_a4: No. Self-referrals, same phone/email accounts, or suspicious referrals are not approved. Commission becomes payable 30 days after successful payment.
aff_faq_q5: How long does approval take after registration?
aff_faq_a5: Your application is usually reviewed within 1–2 business days. On approval your referral link and promo code are activated and you are notified via WhatsApp.
aff_faq_a6: Admin upgrades tiers based on successful paid customers and performance review. Bronze→Silver: 5, Silver→Gold: 20, Gold→Platinum: 50+ customers required.
aff_faq_q7: Do I earn commission if the customer doesn't pay after trial?
aff_faq_a7: No. Commission is generated only from paid subscriptions. There is no commission from free trials. Commission is credited when a trial successfully converts to paid.
aff_faq_q8: How do I earn demo incentives?
aff_faq_a8: Book a demo from the partner portal with the prospect's details. Once admin confirms demo completion, ৳200 incentive is added to your balance.
aff_faq_q9: What happens to commission if a customer is refunded?
aff_faq_a9: If a refund occurs, the related commission is cancelled. If already paid out, it may be adjusted against future payable commission.
aff_faq_q10: What types of businesses does AndgatePOS work for?
aff_faq_a10: Any product-based SME business: pharmacies, clothing shops, grocery, electronics, hardware, restaurants, stationery, and more. Any business can test it with a 14-day free trial.
aff_faq_q11: Are the commission calculator estimates guaranteed?
aff_faq_a11: No. The calculator shows estimated potential earnings only. Actual income depends on successful payments and renewals. AndgatePOS does not guarantee any fixed income.
